contents: A Swords Machine called {a=Person_Johnny}Johnny{a} gets elected as president. They assigned {a=Person_Kermit}Kermit{a} the frog as their assistant and {a=TheGMan}The GMan{a} as the ambassador. Johnny's first executive order was to rename {a=Location_LynxShed}Lynx's shed{a} to "Aheko's cuck shed". Johnny later announced their views on American politics as "generally bad". This caused so much outrage from The GMan, they attempted to assassinate them before Kermit killed him with the Craig Cum Jam ejector powers.

{a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{a} and his mum got hit with a sharknado. He was playing "Furry Nudist Beach" on VRChat and their mum was playing "Honey Pop" on the Sega Mega Drive. They later discover a hole in the roof.

After 69,420 decades of hunting him down, {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} finally kidnapped and interrogated {a=Person_SaintNicholas}Saint Nicholas{a}. Santa made him sit oh their lap and revealed that he has been a "naughty little gamer" and is placed, right next to {a=Person_Gabriel}Gabriel Ultrakill{a}, on the naughty list. He jizzed in his sock and did "something you shouldn't do. hehe tee hee".

{a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} was in a game show, competing against {a=Person_V1}V1{a}. He accidentally let slip that he scratches his butt a lot, when talking to hot women. He also discovers, from {a=Person_Rick}Rick{a}, that his evil twin brother {a=Person_Braig}Braig{a} has terminal cancer. It was inflicted upon them by a guy named {a=Person_Nuts}Nuts{a}, who also killed {a=Person_SaltyToast}Toast{a}.

{a=Person_Rick}Rick{a} begins his own call-in psychiatrist business called {a=Organisation_WWYNATC}Why Wouldn't You Need A Therapy Call{a}. His first case was {a=Person_Elmo}Elmo{a} getting radicalized by Pornhub. They thought they were Brake Brown and their roommate, {a=Person_Dumbass}Dumbass{a} the Streetcleaner, was Jesse Punkman. Elmo kept going on about wanting to take over the government and Dumbass was visibly cringing. They were watching memes about Farting Fluff - a completely original show that is not a rippoff of Breaking Bad. This case then quickly ended with Dumbass trying to burn Rick with their flamethrower, after he made a scary sound with his mouth.
